title: Sama Suljhao Space: A Care-Led Hybrid Mediation Centre in Bangalore
description: Sama has announced the launch of Suljhao Space, a care-led Hybrid Mediation and Online Dispute Resolution Centre in Bengaluru. The centre was inaugurated by eminent expert mediator Sriram Panchu in the presence of senior mediators, lawyers, business leaders, and members of the dispute resolution community.Suljhao Space has been designed to support complex and sensitive disputes through a hybrid mediation model that combines secure digital infrastructure with thoughtfully designed in-person media
